# TS9206

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
Function must have a name for {macro}
```

## Explanation

This macro requires a named function declaration.

Correct:
  @tailrec
  function factorial(n: number): number { ... }

Incorrect:
  @tailrec
  const factorial = (n: number) =&gt; { ... }

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
